description_long: This is a modern, ergonomic swivel chair with a high backrest and segmented padding, upholstered in tan leather or leather-like material. The chair features a robust white and gray plastic shell that encases the seat and back, providing structural support and a contemporary aesthetic. The seat is mounted on a black metal base with four visible casters, allowing for easy movement and rotation. The armrests are wide, flat, and integrated into the side shell, with matching tan padding on top for comfort. The back of the chair displays a red and black logo, adding a distinctive branding element. The overall design suggests durability and comfort, suitable for use in urban offices, control rooms, or public service environments.
description: A high-backed, tan and white ergonomic swivel chair with segmented padding, integrated armrests, and a sturdy wheeled base. The chair features a modern design with a visible logo on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the segmented tan padding, high backrest, and wide padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's thick padding, armrest profile, and the robust white shell structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white shell, integrated armrests, and a prominent red and black logo at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the chair's profile, padding, and base with casters.
attribute_central_support_column: Black metal column with a telescoping feature, supporting a four-legged wheeled base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, segmented, and contoured backrest with tan padded sections and a white plastic shell, providing ergonomic support.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, flat armrests integrated into the side shell, padded with tan material and attached directly to the chair frame.
